text:
Once upon a time, there was an old bookshop. Every morning a friendly fox would visit the bookshop.

One morning, this fox had learned something new. He discovered that books could talk. So he asked each book.

"The last thing I read…"said a picture-book. "Was about a brave cat."

"Oh…"thought the fox. "Maybe I'll read that."

Later he read about a unicorn.

"That sounds lovely…"said the fox. Maybe it'll fly away someday.

Finally he read about an astronaut.

"Wonderful…" He imagined getting lost in SPACE.

Then he met the librarian.

"Have you ever talked?"

The librarian smiled.

"Do try."

She gave him an old tome.

"On adventures."

"I think…"thought the fox. I'll explore.

That night he dreamt of mountains and rivers.

In the morning he climbed uphill anyway.

There was a lake.

"Weird…"he thought.

Then he saw it. A duck.

"Hmm…" He talked to
